errors.explanation: Windows is preventing the Patcher from accessing your files. This usually happens if Minecraft is still running, or you have the files open in Windows Explorer or another Editor. Please close them completely and try again.
The extraction process could not find any .brarchive bundles inside the pack.
A specific file needed by the system was not found. This can happen if the pack structure is incomplete, or an antivirus program deleted parts of the pack.
Data integrity check failed. The source ZIP or original cache files might be corrupted.
